title: BIOS noises at midnight
body: Tuned the fake boot sequence until it felt a little more like an old machine waking up. The tiny hard drive clicks make the whole thing feel weirdly alive.

title: Clouds through glass
body: A small reminder to keep the shiny accidental photos instead of cleaning the camera roll too aggressively. Some of the best little things are just light, clouds, and timing.

title: Burn new CD
body: A fake to-do item became a real mood. Make a short mix, give it a name, overthink the order, then let it loop until it feels like a tiny era.

title: Sort recyclables, keep receipts
body: The most optimistic future is probably still made of boring little chores. Rinse the can, save the battery, label the cable, try again tomorrow.

title: Desert walk after rain
body: The whole trail smelled like dust turning back into earth. Everything was quiet enough to make the city feel far away for a minute.
